cards.title: review-required-work
cards.whyThisLane: Committed P4 decision status is approved with allowed promotion status.

designerSummary.answer: The current review item can be projected into inert board packets because the committed SurfaceOps decision approves it and all packets remain non-executable.
designerSummary.decisionRationale: P3 review queue item is structurally valid, evidence-backed, and remains non-executable.

qualityFindings.rationale: P3 evidence is complete enough for deterministic review while still requiring human handoff.

designerSummary.sourceMaterial: This board is governed by accepted P3 review-queue evidence, accepted P4 review/judgment evidence, and a manifest-declared local kanban.cards substrate contract.

allowed.reason: The committed SurfaceOps decision allows static packet handoff.
allowed.title: review-required-work

promotionStatus.explanation: Upstream proof promotion status is preserved separately from the board card outcome. The current card is allowed because a committed P4 decision approves that review item; P4 remains blocked globally because its proof also proves unsafe fixture outcomes are blocked.
